event_types.label: Coup / Coup Plot
event_types.description: Attempted, threatened, or actual seizure of political power involving military or security actors.

event_types.label: Purge / Command Reshuffle
event_types.description: Forced removals, retirements, command restructuring, or politically salient officer turnover.

event_types.label: Military Aid
event_types.description: Foreign military assistance, financing, training, or equipment transfers.
exclusions: domestic budget decisions without external assistance

event_types.label: Security Cooperation
event_types.description: Joint security cooperation, operational partnerships, bilateral support, or coordination that does not fit exercise or aid cleanly.

event_types.label: Civil-Military Protest
event_types.description: Civil unrest or protest episodes that directly involve security forces, military institutions, or militarized policing.

event_types.label: Security Sector Reform
event_types.description: Legal, doctrinal, administrative, or institutional reforms affecting civil-military relations or security governance.
exclusions: minor administrative updates without institutional consequence

event_types.label: Armed Conflict
event_types.description: Combat or violent confrontation involving state security forces and organized armed actors.

event_types.label: Military Exercise
event_types.description: Bilateral or multilateral military training exercises or drills.

event_types.label: Procurement / Arms
event_types.description: Weapons acquisitions, defense contracts, or arms transfer decisions.

event_types.label: Peace Process
event_types.description: Ceasefires, negotiations, DDR milestones, and peace implementation events.
exclusions: routine public statements with no negotiation content

event_types.label: Organized Crime / Transnational Security
event_types.description: Events involving organized crime, trafficking networks, illicit economies, or related military and security responses.
exclusions: ordinary criminal incidents without strategic significance

event_types.label: Other
event_types.description: Institutionally relevant events not captured by the controlled categories above.
